summary: Iteration 4 — Centers CRUD + Home/Articles/Centers loaded from API + Login bare layout. Backend pytest expanded 55 → 66 tests (added 11 TestCenters cases), ALL 66 PASS (100%). Frontend Playwright validated: /login & /forgot-password render WITHOUT public Header/Footer (bare blue-background layout); admin login → /app/admin → admin-nav-centers → new-center-button opens center-modal; creating a center via center-save-button persists and appears in the dashboard list; public /app/centres shows centers-grid with credda; /app/centres/credda renders 'Prof. Dr. Kennedy Kihangi Bindu' + partenaires + contacts from API; /app/articles shows articles-filter-bar with articles-filter-faculty defaulting to 'all', 7 options listed, changing faculty updates query; home-articles section present on home page. JSON fields (domaineInterventions, partenaires, contacts, etudesRealisees, direction.email/phone) are correctly deserialized to arrays/objects by the backend.

issues: The center modal renders all required fields (cover image dropzone, Direction name/role/email/phone, Domaines/Études/Partenaires/Contacts textareas, Profile RichEditor) but only center-title, center-description and center-save-button expose data-testid attributes. Per the spec, individual field data-testids would improve testability (e.g. center-cover-image, center-direction-name, center-direction-role, center-direction-email, center-direction-phone, center-domaines, center-etudes, center-partenaires, center-contacts, center-profile).

The review request mentions /app/blog-and-articles but the actual route is /app/articles (utils.routes.ts → ARTICLES = '/app/articles'). The /app/articles page DOES expose articles-filter-bar + articles-filter-faculty correctly. Likely a typo in the problem statement; not a code bug.

action_items: (Cosmetic / testability) Add data-testid attributes on the individual fields of the center modal (center-cover-image, center-direction-name/role/email/phone, center-domaines, center-etudes, center-partenaires, center-contacts, center-profile) to enable targeted Playwright assertions. The functionality is correct; only granular testing is impacted.
(Doc only) Note that the public Articles route is /app/articles, not /app/blog-and-articles — update the problem statement accordingly.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/centers.js cleanly separates publish/pending status by role (super_admin → published with publishedAt; faculty_publisher → pending) and uses serializeCenter/deserializeCenter to round-trip JSON columns. Admin-list endpoint correctly scopes by authorId for publishers.

PUT /api/centers/:id correctly updates both scalar fields (title/description/profile/coverImage) and JSON inputs (images, direction, domaineInterventions, etudesRealisees, partenaires, contacts) via JSON.stringify; deserializeCenter on the response returns properly parsed arrays/objects (verified by automated test).
GET /api/centers and /api/centers/slug/:slug return public published-only items; 404 on unknown slug is correct.

App.tsx: Login/ForgotPassword/ResetPassword routes are correctly defined OUTSIDE of the PublicLayout block — verified visually: no Header/Footer on /login or /forgot-password (bare blue-background full-height layout).

Login.tsx uses data-testid="login-email-input" and "login-password-input" (note: not "login-email" / "login-password" as one might assume). forgot-password-link works and navigates to /forgot-password.

Code quality: AdminDashboard still uses leading-slash data-testids for some sidebar items (admin-nav-/articles etc.) but the new admin-nav-centers (without slash) works — recommend normalising across all sidebar links in a future iteration.

Seed: utils/seed.js correctly creates 3 centers (credda, cripe, bersac) with direction including Prof. Dr. Kennedy Kihangi Bindu and JSON arrays for partenaires/contacts/etc., all readable via deserializeCenter.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_ulpgl_backend.py (added TestCenters with 11 cases: public list with JSON fields parsed, credda slug detail incl. direction.name, admin POST published, publisher POST pending, admin PUT all fields, admin approve, admin reject, /centers/admin scoped by authorId for publisher, requires auth, missing fields → 400)
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed centers (admin & publisher). Seed contains 3 centers (credda, cripe, bersac) — credda used as reference for direction/contacts/partenaires assertions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest covers 66 cases. New testids verified on frontend: login-page (bare layout, no header/footer), login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, login-error, forgot-password-link → forgot-password-page (also bare), reset-password-page (also bare). Admin sidebar: admin-nav-centers works (no leading slash, unlike other items). new-center-button, center-modal, center-title, center-description, center-save-button all present. Public: home-articles, centers-grid, articles-filter-bar, articles-filter-faculty (default value=all, options include 'all' + 6 faculties). The Articles route is /app/articles (NOT /app/blog-and-articles — problem statement typo). SendGrid + Cloudinary remain mocked (SKIP / 503).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs. Initial mis-test on /app/blog-and-articles returned 404 (page non trouvée) because the route is /app/articles; once corrected, all filters and grid behaved as expected. Login form testids are *-input/-button suffixed (login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button) — not the bare names from the problem statement.
